_comment: Profile P2 -- the A-GRA planning core (uci_mms_conversion_plan.md §5).
The MA_* planning/approval substance from the a-gra standard review
§6.1/§6.2, plus the UCI plan/approval/status types their closures pull
in automatically.  Validation tier (a) offline only -- no live
validator for this drop exists in-repo, and no compliance is claimed.
STATUS: roots reconciled against the real 5.0a drop's 841 top-level
elements (2026-07-11; the review-guessed MA_MissionPlanStatus does not
exist -- the drop carries MA_MissionPlanActivationStatus).  Root names
follow the top-level *element* names (the MT suffix belongs to the
approved size = everything the roots pull in, 1169 messages + 297
enums.  The per-root size measurements and the validator designation
are recorded in this directory's README.md (P2 conversion-scope
decision).  Do not grow this list without re-running that analysis.
